# BetterCone - AI-Ready B2B SaaS Foundation

> The production-ready foundation for B2B SaaS development with AI coding tools

## Project Overview

BetterCone is a complete B2B SaaS starter optimized for AI-powered development. Use with Cursor, v0, Lovable, Bolt, Claude, ChatGPT, or any AI coding assistant.

**Stack:** Next.js 15, Convex, Better Auth, Stripe, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui

**Repository:** https://github.com/vncsleal/bettercone
**License:** MIT

## Quick Context for AI Tools

### What's Already Built (Don't Rebuild These)

✅ **Authentication System** (Better Auth)
- Email/password with verification
- OAuth providers (GitHub, Google ready)
- Two-factor authentication (TOTP)
- Passkeys (WebAuthn)
- Session management with device tracking
- Password reset flows

✅ **Billing & Subscriptions** (Stripe)
- Three-tier pricing (Free, Pro, Team)
- Subscription management
- Webhook handling
- Customer portal
- Usage-based billing ready

✅ **Team Management** (Multi-tenant)
- Organizations with data isolation
- Role-based access (Owner, Admin, Member)
- Team invitations
- Member management

✅ **Email Service** (Resend + React Email)
- 5 production-ready templates
- Transactional email sending
- Type-safe email functions

✅ **API Infrastructure**
- API key management
- Rate limiting (plan-based)
- Usage tracking
- Secure hashing

✅ **UI Components** (shadcn/ui)
- 50+ pre-built components
- Dark mode support
- Responsive design
- Accessible (WCAG 2.1)

## Architecture Overview

### Backend (Convex)

**Location:** `packages/convex/convex/`

**Key Files:**
- `schema.ts` - Database schema (TypeScript, no SQL!)
- `auth.ts` - Better Auth integration
- `subscriptionPlans.ts` - Billing configuration
- `betterAuth/` - Auth adapter

**Pattern:** All backend logic is TypeScript functions (queries, mutations, actions)
- No SQL queries to write
- Type-safe by default
- Real-time by default

### Frontend (Next.js 15)

**Location:** `apps/web/src/`

**Key Directories:**
- `app/` - Next.js App Router pages
- `components/` - React components
- `lib/` - Utilities and configs
- `emails/` - Email templates

**Patterns:**
- Server Components by default
- Client Components: `"use client"` directive
- Route handlers in `app/api/`

### Key Patterns to Follow

#### 1. Authentication

```typescript
// Already configured - just use the context
import { useSession } from "@/lib/auth-client";

function MyComponent() {
  const { data: session } = useSession();
  if (!session) return <div>Not authenticated</div>;
  // user is authenticated
}
```

#### 2. Organizations (Multi-tenancy)

```typescript
// Use existing organization context
import { useOrganization } from "@/hooks/use-organization";

function MyFeature() {
  const { currentOrganization } = useOrganization();
  // All queries should filter by currentOrganization.id
}
```

#### 3. Convex Queries

```typescript
// In packages/convex/convex/yourFeature.ts
import { query, mutation } from "./_generated/server";
import { v } from "convex/values";

export const list = query({
  args: { organizationId: v.id("organizations") },
  handler: async (ctx, args) => {
    // Check auth
    const userId = await getUserId(ctx);
    if (!userId) throw new Error("Unauthorized");
    
    // Query data
    return await ctx.db
      .query("yourTable")
      .withIndex("by_organization", (q) => 
        q.eq("organizationId", args.organizationId)
      )
      .collect();
  },
});
```

#### 4. UI Components

```typescript
// Use shadcn/ui components from @/components/ui/
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Card } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";

// They're already styled with Tailwind
```

## Adding New Features

### Step 1: Define Schema

Add to `packages/convex/convex/schema.ts`:

```typescript
yourTable: defineTable({
  organizationId: v.id("organizations"),
  name: v.string(),
  // ... your fields
  createdAt: v.number(),
  createdBy: v.id("users"),
})
.index("by_organization", ["organizationId"])
```

### Step 2: Create Backend Functions

Create `packages/convex/convex/yourFeature.ts`:

```typescript
export const list = query({...})
export const get = query({...})
export const create = mutation({...})
export const update = mutation({...})
export const remove = mutation({...})
```

### Step 3: Create Frontend Page

Create `apps/web/src/app/demo/your-feature/page.tsx`:

```typescript
"use client";

import { useQuery, useMutation } from "convex/react";
import { api } from "@repo/convex";

export default function YourFeaturePage() {
  const { currentOrganization } = useOrganization();
  const items = useQuery(
    api.yourFeature.list,
    currentOrganization?.id 
      ? { organizationId: currentOrganization.id }
      : "skip"
  );
  // ... render with shadcn/ui components
}
```

## Common Patterns

### Check Permissions

```typescript
// In Convex mutations
const member = await ctx.db
  .query("organizationMembers")
  .withIndex("by_organization_user", (q) =>
    q.eq("organizationId", args.organizationId)
     .eq("userId", userId)
  )
  .first();

if (!member) throw new Error("Not a member");
if (member.role !== "owner" && member.role !== "admin") {
  throw new Error("No permission");
}
```

### Rate Limiting

```typescript
// Use existing rate limiter
import { checkRateLimit } from "./rateLimit";

await checkRateLimit(ctx, userId, "api_calls");
```

### Send Emails

```typescript
// Use existing email service
import { sendWelcomeEmail } from "@/lib/email";

await sendWelcomeEmail(user.email, user.name);
```

### Form Validation

```typescript
// Use react-hook-form + zod
import { useForm } from "react-hook-form";
import { zodResolver } from "@hookform/resolvers/zod";
import { z } from "zod";

const schema = z.object({
  name: z.string().min(1),
});

const form = useForm({
  resolver: zodResolver(schema),
});
```

## File Structure Reference

```
packages/convex/convex/
├── schema.ts              # Database schema - ADD YOUR TABLES HERE
├── auth.ts                # Auth integration - DON'T MODIFY
├── subscriptionPlans.ts   # Billing config - MODIFY FOR PRICING
├── yourFeature.ts         # ADD YOUR BACKEND LOGIC HERE
└── betterAuth/            # Auth adapter - DON'T MODIFY

apps/web/src/
├── app/
│   ├── api/auth/          # Auth API routes - DON'T MODIFY
│   ├── demo/              # Feature pages - ADD YOUR PAGES HERE
│   └── providers.tsx      # Root providers - DON'T MODIFY
├── components/
│   ├── ui/                # shadcn/ui - USE THESE COMPONENTS
│   └── your-feature/      # ADD YOUR COMPONENTS HERE
├── lib/
│   ├── auth-client.ts     # Auth client - DON'T MODIFY
│   ├── email.ts           # Email service - USE FOR EMAILS
│   └── utils.ts           # Utilities - ADD HELPERS HERE
└── emails/                # Email templates - ADD NEW TEMPLATES HERE
```

## Environment Variables

Required for development:

```bash
# Convex
CONVEX_DEPLOYMENT=dev:your-deployment
NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL=https://your-deployment.convex.cloud

# Better Auth
BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=generate-random-string
BETTER_AUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000

# Stripe (for billing)
STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_...
NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=pk_test_...

# Resend (for emails)
RESEND_API_KEY=re_...
RESEND_FROM_EMAIL=noreply@yourdomain.com
```

## Don't Do These (Common AI Mistakes)

❌ Don't add NextAuth (we use Better Auth)
❌ Don't add Prisma/Drizzle (we use Convex)
❌ Don't add new auth logic (use existing)
❌ Don't hardcode organization IDs (use context)
❌ Don't create new UI library (use shadcn/ui)
❌ Don't add SQL queries (use Convex TypeScript)
❌ Don't rebuild billing (extend existing)

## Useful Commands

```bash
# Install dependencies
pnpm install

# Start Convex backend
cd packages/convex && pnpm convex dev

# Start Next.js frontend
pnpm dev

# Preview email templates
cd apps/web && pnpm email

# Type check
pnpm type-check

# Lint
pnpm lint
```

## Documentation

**AI Resources:** (in `.ai/` folder)
- **AI Quick Start:** `.ai/AI_QUICK_START.md` - 60-second setup
- **AI Development Guide:** `.ai/AI_DEVELOPMENT_GUIDE.md` - Complete guide
- **AI Prompts Library:** `.ai/AI_PROMPTS.md` - 300+ prompts
- **Feature Templates:** `.ai/feature-templates.md` - Code scaffolds
- **AI Context:** `.ai/context.md` - Quick reference

**Project Documentation:**
- **Project Structure:** `docs/PROJECT_STRUCTURE.md`
- **Email Service:** `docs/EMAIL_SERVICE.md`
- **Environment Variables:** `docs/ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES.md`
- **Quick Reference:** `QUICK_REFERENCE.md`

## Example Prompts

### Add New Feature

```
I'm using BetterCone with Convex and Better Auth.

Add a "projects" feature:
1. Add projects table to packages/convex/convex/schema.ts
2. Create packages/convex/convex/projects.ts with CRUD functions
3. Create apps/web/src/app/demo/projects/page.tsx
4. Link to organizations, check permissions
5. Use shadcn/ui components

Follow existing patterns in the codebase.
```

### Customize Billing

```
Modify BetterCone's Stripe integration:
- Update packages/convex/convex/subscriptionPlans.ts
- Change Free plan to 5 projects limit
- Change Pro plan to $49/mo with 50 projects
- Keep existing webhook logic
```

### Add Email Template

```
Create a new email template in apps/web/src/emails/:
- Name: project-invitation-email.tsx
- Use React Email components
- Follow pattern from team-invitation-email.tsx
- Add send function to apps/web/src/lib/email.ts
```
